size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the status component for the dot: M3 ships no standalone status dot, so the size maps from the badge in dot form (md.comp.badge, ~6dp) per the approved spec's Constitutional Surface.

shadow.$description: Material 3 shadow used by the status component: the M3 badge dot is flat (no elevation documented), so the theme resolves the effect to a transparent level0 shadow (tooltip.material3 precedent; FR-006 allows a theme to resolve effects to none).
